title: Picker
description: A component that provides a customizable picker interface for selecting values from a predefined range. It provides an intuitive interface for adjusting values through a carousel-style selection, making it ideal for applications that require numeric input within specific limits.

sections.title: Usage
sections.description: A simple example of using ax-picker-items within a picker container

types.title: AXPickerItemsComponent
types.description: The main picker component that displays selectable items in a carousel format. Extends MXValueComponent to provide value management and form integration.

props.name: items
props.description: The list of items to display in the picker. Each item should have an id and text property.

props.name: valueField
props.description: The field name to use for the item value. Defaults to 'id'.

props.name: textField
props.description: The field name to use for displaying item text. Defaults to 'text'.

props.name: slidesPerGroup
props.description: Number of slides to move when navigating. If not set, defaults to 1.

props.name: loop
props.description: Whether to enable infinite loop scrolling.

props.name: minValue
props.description: Minimum allowed value. Items below this value will be disabled.

props.name: maxValue
props.description: Maximum allowed value. Items above this value will be disabled.

props.name: disabled
props.description: Whether the picker is disabled. Inherited from MXInteractiveComponent.

props.name: readonly
props.description: Whether the picker is readonly. Inherited from MXValueComponent.

props.name: value
props.description: The currently selected value. Inherited from MXValueComponent.

props.name: state
props.description: The current state of the component. Inherited from MXValueComponent.

props.name: name
props.description: The name of the component. Inherited from MXValueComponent.

props.name: tabIndex
props.description: Specifies the tabindex of the component. Inherited from MXInteractiveComponent.

events.name: onValueChanged
events.description: Emitted when the selected value changes. This event provides detailed information about the change including the old and new values, and whether it was triggered by user interaction. Inherited from MXValueComponent.

events.name: valueChange
events.description: Emitted when the selected value changes. This is the legacy event for backward compatibility. Inherited from MXValueComponent.

events.name: stateChange
events.description: Emitted when the component state changes. Inherited from MXValueComponent.

events.name: readonlyChange
events.description: Emitted when the readonly state changes. Inherited from MXValueComponent.

events.name: disabledChange
events.description: Emitted when the disabled state changes. Inherited from MXInteractiveComponent.

events.name: onFocus
events.description: Emitted when the component gets focused. Inherited from MXInteractiveComponent.

events.name: onBlur
events.description: Emitted when the component gets blurred. Inherited from MXInteractiveComponent.

events.name: onOptionChanged
events.description: Emitted when an option related to the component changes. Inherited from MXBaseComponent.

methods.content:
/**
 * Gets the host HTML element of the component.
 *
 * @returns T - The native DOM element associated with this component.
 */
getHostElement<T = HTMLElement>(): T

/**
 * Sets a component option with optional lifecycle callbacks.
 *
 * @param option - The option configuration containing the name, value and optional before/after callbacks.
 */
setOption<T = any>(option: MXComponentSetOption<T>): void

/**
 * Removes focus from the component.
 */
blur(): void

/**
 * Checks if the component is focused or has any focused element.
 *
 * @returns boolean - True if the component has focus.
 */
hasFocus(): boolean

/**
 * Registers a callback function to be called when the component is touched.
 *
 * @param fn - The callback function to register.
 */
registerOnTouched(fn: () => void): void

/**
 * Sets the disabled state of the component.
 *
 * @param isDisabled - Whether the component should be disabled.
 */
setDisabledState(isDisabled: boolean): void

types.title: AXPickerContainerComponent
types.description: A container component that wraps the picker title and items. Provides structural layout and styling.

props.name: customClass
props.description: Custom CSS class to apply to the container.
